items.name: Lilypad Network
items.desc: Distributed GPU compute network for AI: verifiable, trustless inference across thousands of nodes. Built from a single Filecoin smart contract to globally deployed, open-source infrastructure.

items.name: Waterlily.ai
items.desc: First AI-generated art platform paying on-chain royalties to artists. Built on FVM with Bacalhau and Stable Diffusion; covered by SiliconANGLE and featured by Filecoin Foundation.

items.name: Olas Research Agent
items.desc: Live AI research-assistant agent on the Olas / Pearl marketplace. Full pipeline from design to production, accepted into the Olas Agent Accelerator.

items.name: RAG / CAG Pipeline
items.desc: Retrieval (RAG) paired with a cached context bundle (CAG) for AI context management. The engine powering the assistant on this very site.

items.name: GPU Verification (arXiv)
items.desc: Co-authored peer-reviewed research proposing binary and ternary consensus frameworks for verifying non-deterministic GPU workloads on trustless networks.

items.name: Lilypad v0 (FVM × Bacalhau)
items.desc: The FVM-to-Bacalhau bridge relayer that became the technical origin of Lilypad: decentralised compute triggered directly from a smart contract.
